title: MSD 96-well human cytokine assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"apkdr","text":"This protocol describes MesoScale Discovery (MSD) assays  for measurement of proinflammatory cytokines in supernatants collected from T cell dependent cytotoxicity (TDCC) cultures after BiTE® treatment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Human Proinflammatory-4 I Tissue Culture Kit, MSD, P/N K15009B-2, Lot # K0034148 Human Proinflammatory-4 I Plate, MSD, P/N N45009B-1, Lot # Z0044786 Diluent 1, MSD, P/N R50CK-4, Lot #Y0220021 Diluent 100, MSD, P/N R50AA-4, Lot #Y0270189 MSD Blocker B, P/N R93BB-2, Lot # Y0210033 Human Proinflammatory-4 I Antibody Blend, MSD, P/N D2009-3, Lot # D0032825 Human Proinflammatory-4 I Calibrator Blend, MSD, P/N C0009-2, Lot # A0031804 PBST (PBS + 0.05% Tween 20) DPBS, Life, P/N 14190
Wash Buffer (PBS + 0.05% Tween 20): 2L (2000mL) PBS + 1.0 mL Tween20 Prepare Blocker B Solution (1% w/v Blocker B in PBS): 20 mL PBS + 200 mg Blocker B
Add 150 uL of Blocker B Solution (Step 2) to each well of the pre-coated plate Seal the plate Incubate for 1 hour at room temperature, with shaking at 800 rpm
1. Wash the plate 3X with PBST using a plate washer 2. Blot plate on a paper towel
Add 25 µL of neat sample and standards to the appropriate wells of the plate Seal the plate Incubate for 2 hours at room temperature, with shaking at 800 rpm
2.94 mL Diluent 100 + 60 µL 50X Detection Antibody Keep in the dark
25 µL of Detection Antibody Solution to each well Seal the plate Cover with aluminum foil Incubate for 2 hours at room temperature, with shaking at 800 rpm
11 mL DI H20 + 11 mL 4X Read Buffer
After incubation, wash the plate 3X with PBST using a plate washer Blot plate on a paper towel
Add 150 µL 2X Read Buffer solution to each well of the MSD plate Make sure there are NO BUBBLES Read immediately on MSD instrument
creator: Sandra Ross
